_doc: Kalshi auto-trading risk parameters and feature flags.
Secrets (API key ID + private key) are NEVER stored here — they live in
All caps default to safe values; raise gradually as confidence builds.
auto_trading_enabled_doc: Master kill switch. Default false. When false, Phase 3 order-placement
runs are skipped entirely. Even when true, individual safety caps below
PAUSED 2026-05-27 — rebuilding from the bottom up the right way. 12 live
bets returned 5-5 / -2.5% ROI with CLV -1.2% (yellow flag from the least
noisy signal we have). Paper -22.7%. Re-enable ONLY after BOTH:
(1) CLV >= +1% over >= 20 graded paper/shadow bets, AND
(2) Paper ROI >= 0% on the market we want to promote.
Re-enable ONE market at a time, smallest stakes, watch CLV daily.
environment_doc: Note: env var KALSHI_ENVIRONMENT (set to 'live' in workflows by
default) takes precedence over this field. Field is kept for
consistency / local testing without env vars set.
min_calibrated_score_doc: Only auto-place picks at calibrated score ≥ this value.
Lowered 65→60 on 2026-05-25. The ≥65 gate only ever cleared ~5 teams
(Rays/Braves/Yankees/Brewers/Cubs) → the same 2-3 bets daily, and it
blocked teams the model genuinely likes but prices fairly (the Dodgers
and Guardians both topped out at 63, never bet). Calibration audit (256
graded picks) showed the 60-64 band is +EV: 59% win / +12.7% ROI (n=91),
~2.4x the volume at ~the same ROI as ≥65. Caveat: that's in-sample; the
weekly calibration-watch tracks the 60-64 band forward. Do NOT raise
above 65 — the sweep showed ≥68 collapses to +2.7%.
supported_bet_types_doc: What bet types are eligible for LIVE auto-placement (real money).
Currently ML only. Spread/total need their own Kalshi market mapping
logic and have separate considerations. See paper_supported_bet_types
live_excluded_sports_doc: Sports BLOCKED from live auto-placement (uppercase, matches pick.sport).
NHL excluded 2026-05-25: live NHL ML went 0-3 / -100% ROI (-$4.19, all
Colorado Avalanche heavy favorites) — it was the entire drag on the
record while MLB ran +26%. Our 254-game NHL study found no favorite edge
(only small underdogs are +EV, parked for next season), and the NHL
season is nearly over. MLB-only for now. Empty the list to re-enable a
sport. Paper tracks are unaffected by this gate.
alt_total_min_edge_doc: Min edge (our P(side) − Kalshi ask) for an MLB alt-total paper pick.
0.05 = 5 points. Alt-total candidates come from the market-anchored
AltTotalEngine (σ=3.8) priced against Kalshi's KXMLBTOTAL ladder, pregame
only, with thin/stale-book filters. Paper-only until validated.
paper_supported_bet_types_doc: What bet types are tracked in the PAPER (simulated, never placed)
performance track. Set to ['ou'] so O/U picks get graded against
actual outcomes for model validation without risking real money.
Once the paper track shows consistent profitable hit rate ≥52.4%,
we can promote a bet type from paper → supported_bet_types and the
auto-pipeline starts placing it for real.
paper_min_calibrated_score_doc: Cal-score floor for paper-track picks — separate from the live
min_calibrated_score gate. Set lower (50 = essentially any pick the
model produces) so we accumulate paper samples fast for validation.
Live bets need 65+ confidence to be worth real money risk; paper
bets just need to be above coin-flip (50).
_RISK_CAPS_doc: All caps are now PERCENTAGES of the live Kalshi balance, not fixed
dollars. This auto-scales every cap as the account compounds — no
manual stage-bumping. The old fixed-dollar caps were set against a
$500 reference bankroll but the real balance was ~$38, leaving the
kill switch at 66% of bankroll (would let you lose two-thirds before
halting). Percentages fix that at every account size.
Effective per-pick cap = min(bankroll × max_stake_pct, hard_ceiling).
The hard ceiling is the ONE manual lever — raise it deliberately as
the live track record builds (that's the 'Kelly ramp').
Fixed-dollar keys below are kept ONLY as fallbacks if a pct key is
missing — the pct keys take precedence everywhere.
max_stake_pct_of_bankroll_doc: No single order risks more than this fraction of live bankroll.
0.10 = 10%. With quarter Kelly already sizing the stake, this is a
ceiling that only binds on the highest-edge picks.
max_daily_exposure_pct_doc: Total auto-placed stake in one ET day caps at this fraction of live
bankroll. 0.30 = 30%. Lets the typical 1-3 daily picks fire fully
kill_switch_loss_pct_doc: If yesterday's reconciled PnL was below this fraction of bankroll
(0.20 = -20%), place_orders.py refuses to place ANY orders today.
Auto-resets the next day if PnL recovers. Always 20% of CURRENT
max_stake_hard_ceiling_doc: Absolute dollar ceiling on any single order, on top of the pct cap.
THIS is the manual Kelly-ramp lever: percentages handle smooth
scaling underneath, but no bet ever exceeds this until you raise it.
Bump 25 → 50 → 100 as live ROI proves out over weeks. The morning
recap's stage advisor tells you when the gates are met.
kelly_fraction_doc: Fractional Kelly multiplier. 1.0 = full Kelly (max growth, max
bankroll_doc: FALLBACK reference bankroll, used ONLY if the live Kalshi balance
fetch fails. Normal operation auto-syncs bankroll from the live
_deprecated_fixed_caps_doc: Deprecated fixed-dollar caps. Superseded by the pct keys above.
Kept only as fallbacks if a corresponding pct key is missing.
skip_if_yes_ask_above_cents_doc: Don't place if the YES side asking price is ≥ this many cents (≥80%
implied probability). Even on heavy favorites, low edge × high
